Aristoflex® Eco T — natural carbomer alternative with 71% renewable carbon index

notes: Swiss specialty chemicals leader with the iconic Aristoflex® brand of carbomer alternatives and sensorial texture systems. Aristoflex® AVC is the industry benchmark for carbomer alternatives, providing outstanding rheology control and skin feel, while Aristoflex® Eco T offers a natural-origin option with 71% renewable carbon index for clean beauty formulations. Clariant's sensorial ingredient systems are widely used in premium skincare and sun care products globally.
